name: Global Skills Development Report
description: This report is designed to be given to individuals who have completed the Global Skills Assessment (GSA). With coverage across the Great 8 Domains, this measure of self-reported behaviors offers a complete overview of their current skills.

name: .NET Framework 4.5
description: The .NET Framework 4.5 test measures knowledge of .NET environment.

name: .NET MVC (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of Model-View-Controller (MVC) architecture, validation, security, routing, and areas.

name: Agile Software Development
description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of agile methodology, scrum, feature driven software development, incremental and iterative development.

name: AI Skills
description: The AI Skills assessment measures the skills that help candidates successfully leverage AI in their work.

name: Amazon Web Services (AWS) Development (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of AWS delivery process, monitoring, metrics, logging, security, validation and scalability.

name: Android Development (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of UI components for an Android device, services and alerts, animation and media apps.

name: Angular 6 (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of Angular 6 components, modules, data binding, dependency injection, CRUD with HTTP, typescript, routing and navigation.

name: AngularJS (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of AngularJS architecture, forms, directives, filters, controllers, routing and testing.

name: Automata (New)
description: An AI-powered coding simulation assessment that evaluates candidate programming ability. Offers a familiar IDE environment available in over 40 different programming languages.

name: Automata Data Science (New)
description: A simulated test that measures the ability to analyze and modify data using machine learning algorithms.

name: Automata Data Science Pro (New)
description: A simulated test that measures the ability to analyze and modify data using machine learning algorithms to obtain desirable results.

name: Automata - Fix (New)
description: A simulated compiler integrated test to measure debugging skills in C, C++ and Java.

name: Automata Front End
description: Simulation based test that measures the front-end development capabilities using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.

name: Automata Pro (New)
description: An AI-powered coding simulation assessment that evaluates candidate programming ability in over 40 languages using real-world problems.

name: Automata Selenium
description: A coding simulation assessment that evaluates the ability to conduct automation testing using Selenium scripts.

name: Automata - SQL (New)
description: A simulated query writing test that measures the ability to write SQL queries to perform DDL, DML and DCL tasks.

name: Business Communication (adaptive)
description: Adaptive test that measures knowledge of communicating in the workplace effectively with coworkers and external business contacts.

name: C Programming (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of C programming basics, functions, arrays, composed data types, and advanced C concepts.

name: C# Programming (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of C# programming structure, functions, collections, OOPs constructs, inheritance and event handling.

name: C++ Programming (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of programming in the C++ language and the ability to use the C++ standard library.

name: Cloud Computing (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of cloud computing concepts, cloud service models, virtualization and private clouds.

name: Computer Science (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of operating system, computer architecture, DBMS and basics of computer networks.

name: Contact Center Call Simulation (New)
description: Simulation based test that measures the ability to handle customer concerns over a call by referring to standard process documents.

name: Conversational Multichat Simulation
description: Simulation-based test that measures the ability to handle customer concerns over multiple chats.

name: Core Java (Advanced Level) (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of basic Java constructs, OOP concepts, files and exception handling, generics, collections, threads and concurrency.

name: Core Java (Entry Level) (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of basic Java constructs, OOP concepts, file handling, exception handling, threads and generic class.

name: Data Science (New)
description: Multi-choice test on how to use machine learning to analyze data, extract information, draw conclusions and make statistically-driven decisions.

name: Data Warehousing Concepts
description: Tests knowledge of Data Warehousing including Big Data, Business Considerations, Data Transformation, OLAP, Querying and Reporting.

name: Dependability and Safety Instrument (DSI)
description: A short pre-screening tool to identify potential employees with good dependability and reliability, less likely to engage in counter-productive work behaviors.

name: Docker (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of Docker container, data management, Docker performance and swarm.

name: Entry Level Cashier Solution
description: For entry-level retail positions in which employees receive payment in cash, check, or credit cards.

name: Entry Level Customer Serv-Retail & Contact Center
description: For entry-level positions requiring customer interaction by providing information or carrying out customer requests.

name: Entry Level Customer Service (General) Solution
description: For a wide range of entry-level positions where employees interact with customers.

name: Entry Level Sales Solution
description: For entry-level positions in which employees proactively sell products or services to customers.

name: Entry Level Technical Support Solution
description: For entry-level positions providing technical assistance to computer users in a contact center environment.

name: Executive Scenarios
description: A unique test of Managerial Judgement for Executives; hypothetical scenarios rated on a 6-point scale from highly undesirable to highly desirable.

name: ExpressJS (New)
description: Multi-choice test measuring routing, error handling, security, middleware and performance in ExpressJS.

name: Financial Accounting (New)
description: Multi-choice test measuring ability to post journal entries, classify assets/liabilities, analyze financial statements and calculate financial ratios.

name: Financial and Banking Services (New)
description: Multi-choice test measuring knowledge of investment products, banking products, taxation and macroeconomics.

name: GIT (New)
description: Multi-choice test measuring knowledge of GIT for version control.

name: Global Skills Assessment
description: Measures 96 discrete skills/behaviors aligned to SHL's Universal Competency Framework. Measures self-reported behaviors an individual currently engages in.

name: Graduate Scenarios
description: A unique test of Managerial Judgement for graduates with limited work experience; hypothetical scenarios rated on a 6-point scale.

name: HIPAA (Security)
description: Tests knowledge of compliance with HIPAA Security and Electronic Signature Standards for healthcare professionals.

name: HiPo Assessment Report 1.0
description: Helps organizations identify individuals with the strongest potential to succeed in senior roles using OPQ, MQ, and Verify.

name: HiPo Assessment Report 2.0
description: Helps organizations identify individuals with the strongest potential to succeed in senior and challenging roles.

name: HTML/CSS (New)
description: Multi-choice test measuring knowledge of HTML to create a user interface and CSS to stylize it.

name: HTML5 (New)
description: Multi-choice test measuring knowledge of HTML5 for creating user interfaces.

name: Human Resources (New)
description: Multi-choice test measuring knowledge of HR management — planning, training, performance appraisal, compensation management.

name: Interpersonal Communications
description: Adaptive test measuring knowledge of effective verbal and non-verbal communication, conflict management, and intercultural communication.

name: Java 8 (New)
description: Multi-choice test measuring knowledge of Java class design, exceptions, generics, collections, concurrency, JDBC and Java I/O fundamentals.

name: Java Frameworks (New)
description: Multi-choice test measuring knowledge of Java frameworks — Struts, Hibernate and Spring.

name: JavaScript (New)
description: Multi-choice test measuring knowledge of programming in JavaScript and its application in front-end development.

name: Jenkins (New)
description: Multi-choice test measuring knowledge of Jenkins configuration, deployment, plugins, nodes, build jobs and testing.

name: jQuery (New)
description: Multi-choice test measuring knowledge of jQuery events, effects, animation, UI, references and AJAX.

name: Kubernetes (New)
description: Multi-choice test measuring knowledge of Kubernetes architecture, cluster and services.

name: Linux Administration (New)
description: Multi-choice test measuring knowledge of the Linux operating system in system and network administration.

name: Linux Programming (General)
description: Tests knowledge of programming in a Linux environment — AutoConf, Makefiles, C, C++, debugging, revision control, RPC/CORBA.

name: Management Scenarios
description: A unique test of Managerial Judgement — hypothetical scenarios rated on a 6-point scale for hiring managers and mid-level professionals.

name: Marketing (New)
description: Multi-choice test measuring knowledge of marketing principles, market research, consumer behavior, brand management and sales management.

name: Microservices (New)
description: Multi-choice test measuring knowledge of Microservices architecture, SOA, and Microservices patterns.

name: MS Excel (New)
description: Multi-choice test measuring the ability to use MS Excel to maintain, organize, analyze and present numeric data.

name: Microsoft Excel 365 - Essentials (New)
description: Simulation evaluating ability to perform MS Excel operations — formulas, data analysis, formatting, workbook management.

name: Microsoft Excel 365 (New)
description: Simulation evaluating ability to perform operations in a simulated MS Excel environment — formulas, data, formatting, workbooks.

name: Microsoft PowerPoint 365 - Essentials (New)
description: Simulation evaluating PowerPoint operations — transitions, animations, formatting, reviewing and delivering presentations.

name: Microsoft Word 365 - Essentials (New)
description: Simulation evaluating MS Word operations — creating, formatting, proofreading and securing documents.

name: Microsoft Word 365 (New)
description: Simulation evaluating MS Word operations — creating, formatting, proofreading, maintaining and securing documents.

name: MS Word (New)
description: Multi-choice test measuring the ability to use MS Word to record and save textual information.

name: MS PowerPoint (New)
description: Multi-choice test measuring knowledge of MS PowerPoint toolbars, slide layouts, animation, slideshow and formats.

name: Multitasking Ability
description: A split-screen simulation measuring ability to work on multiple tasks simultaneously while maintaining efficiency.

name: Motivation Questionnaire MQM5
description: Measures 18 dimensions of an individual motivation, providing understanding of situations that increase or reduce their motivation.

name: Networking and Implementation (New)
description: Multi-choice test measuring knowledge of networking devices, protocols, reference models, routing and implementation.

name: Node.js (New)
description: Multi-choice test measuring knowledge of Node.js — events, streams, file system, error handling, concurrency and express framework.

name: Occupational Personality Questionnaire OPQ32r
description: The SHL OPQ32 is one of the most widely used measures of workplace behavioural style, providing a clear framework for understanding the impact of personality on job performance.

name: OPQ Leadership Report
description: This OPQ report provides a detailed analysis of an individual leadership potential based on SHL's Leadership Model.

name: OPQ MQ Sales Report
description: This OPQ report provides a graphical and narrative summary of an individual natural style critical to sales success, optionally enriched with MQ motivators.

name: OPQ Universal Competency Report 1.0
description: This OPQ report is based on the Universal Competency framework, graphically outlining how personality impacts competencies.

name: OPQ Universal Competency Report 2.0
description: This OPQ report is based on the Universal Competency framework, graphically outlining how personality impacts competencies.

name: Project Management (2013)
description: Tests knowledge of project management based on PMI PMBOK — communications, cost, scope, risk, quality and time management.

name: Python (New)
description: Multi-choice test measuring knowledge of Python programming, databases, modules and library.

name: ReactJS (New)
description: Multi-choice test measuring knowledge of React APIs, render function, JSX, form validation and styling.

name: RemoteWorkQ
description: Measures self-reported behavioral tendencies in Work Relationships, Work Habits, and Self-Development for remote work effectiveness.

name: RESTful Web Services (New)
description: Multi-choice test measuring knowledge of REST features, architecture, handling requests, security, filters and interceptors.

name: Ruby (New)
description: Multi-choice test measuring knowledge of Ruby strings, collections, OOP, exception handling, database connectivity, threads and web applications.

name: Ruby on Rails (New)
description: Multi-choice test measuring knowledge of Ruby Programming, Rails installation, Rails MVC and Rails programming model.

name: Sales & Service Phone Simulation
description: Contact center simulation for roles involving sales or sales-related behaviors such as recommending products or retaining customers.

name: Sales & Service Phone Solution
description: Contact center solution combining simulation and behavioral tests for entry-level sales/service roles.

name: Sales Transformation 1.0 - Individual Contributor
description: OPQ-based report measuring a salesperson ability to sell in a digital-first environment.

name: Sales Transformation 2.0 - Individual Contributor
description: OPQ-based report measuring a salesperson ability to sell well in a digital-first environment with updated model.

name: Sales Transformation Report 1.0 - Sales Manager
description: Combines OPQ and a Sales Management questionnaire to measure a sales manager capability to lead a digital-first sales transformation.

name: Sales Transformation Report 2.0 - Sales Manager
description: Combines OPQ and a Sales Management questionnaire to measure a sales manager capability in a digital-first environment.

name: Salesforce Development (New)
description: Multi-choice test measuring knowledge of Salesforce platform, design, data models, business logic, data management and analytics.

name: SHL Verify Interactive - Inductive Reasoning
description: Evaluates ability to identify specific patterns in data or situations and generalize that information to broader contexts.

name: SHL Verify Interactive - Deductive Reasoning
description: Measures the ability to draw logical conclusions based on information provided, identify strengths and weaknesses of arguments.

name: SHL Verify Interactive - Numerical Reasoning
description: Assesses how the candidate comprehends numerical information in various formats.

name: SHL Verify Interactive G+
description: Test of general cognitive ability measuring Deductive, Inductive, and Numerical Reasoning in a single adaptive test.

name: Smart Interview Live Coding
description: Real-time online coding interview with a compiler interface enabling one-to-one, panel and group technical interviews across various programming languages.

name: Smart Interview Live
description: Real-time video interview tool allowing recruiters to remotely engage with candidates with whiteboards, file-sharing and a curated question bank.

name: Smart Interview On Demand
description: Recorded asynchronous video interview tool for streamlined screening of candidates.

name: SQL (New)
description: Multi-choice test measuring knowledge of SQL queries, data manipulation and transaction processing.

name: Spring (New)
description: Multi-choice test measuring knowledge of Spring core, AOP, IOC container and transactions.

name: SVAR - Spoken English (Indian Accent) (New)
description: Automated spoken English test measuring fluency, pronunciation, active listening, vocabulary, grammar and spoken English understanding.

name: SVAR - Spoken English (US) (New)
description: Automated spoken English test measuring fluency, pronunciation, active listening, vocabulary, grammar and spoken English understanding.

description: Automated spoken English test measuring fluency, pronunciation, active listening, vocabulary and spoken English understanding.

name: SVAR - Spoken English (U.K.)
description: Automated spoken English test measuring fluency, pronunciation, active listening, vocabulary, grammar and spoken English understanding.

description: Automated spoken French test measuring fluency, pronunciation, active listening, vocabulary and spoken French understanding.

description: Automated spoken Spanish test measuring fluency, pronunciation, active listening, vocabulary and spoken Spanish understanding.

name: Tableau (New)
description: Multi-choice test measuring knowledge of Tableau for tables, visualizations, calculations, filters and forecasting.

name: Time Management (U.S.)
description: Adaptive test measuring knowledge of time management in the workplace — planning, scheduling, organizing and decision making.

name: UiPath RPA Development (New)
description: Multi-choice test measuring knowledge of UiPath architecture, workflows recording, UI interaction, automation and orchestrator.

name: Verify - G+
description: Tests general cognitive ability across Numerical, Deductive, and Inductive reasoning — 30 questions adaptive, appropriate for all job levels.

name: Verify - Deductive Reasoning
description: Measures ability to draw logical conclusions, identify strengths/weaknesses of arguments, and complete scenarios with incomplete information.

name: Verify - Inductive Reasoning (2014)
description: Measures logical reasoning ability — ability to identify patterns and resolve complex and ambiguous problems.

name: Verify - Numerical Ability
description: Measures ability to derive numerical problems, calculate answers, and work with numerical data in workplace contexts.

name: Verify - Verbal Ability - Next Generation
description: Adaptive test measuring reading comprehension, interpreting tone, identifying main ideas and predicting author intent.

name: Virtual Assessment and Development Centers
description: Innovative virtual assessment centers delivering a full range of exercises — inbox simulations, written analysis, coaching, role-plays and group exercises.

description: Open response test evaluating ability to write proper emails — scored on content, grammar and email etiquette.

description: Open response test evaluating ability to write proper managerial emails — scored on content, grammar and email etiquette.

description: Measures behaviors underlying successful and safe performance in industrial/manufacturing settings.

description: Comprehensive range of Assessment and Development Centre exercises in digital format — group exercises, role plays, analysis presentations and written exercises.

name: 360 Multi-Rater Feedback System (MFS)
description: Provides a holistic 360-degree view of an employee gathering feedback from manager, peers, direct reports and other raters based on SHL UCF competencies.

name: Enterprise Leadership Report 2.0
description: Assess and benchmark leaders against the enterprise leadership model for leader impact to drive business results.

description: Multi-choice test measuring knowledge of Java class design, exceptions, generics, collections, concurrency, JDBC and Java I/O fundamentals.
